shared dimDate = let

//Function 1 - Generate a Date Table --------------------------------------------------

_fxDateTable = (StartDate as date, EndDate as date, optional Holidays as table) =>

let


    //Control Parameters
    _Holidays = if Holidays is null then Table.FromRecords({[Date = null, HolidayNameENG = null, HolidayName = null]}, type table[Date = Date.Type, HolidayNameENG = Text.Type, HolidayName = Text.Type]) else Holidays,

    _StartDate = Date.StartOfYear(StartDate),
    _EndDate = Date.EndOfYear(EndDate),
    
    //Current Date Values
    _CurrentDate = Date.From(DateTimeZone.UtcNow()),
    _CurrentYear = Date.Year( Date.From(_CurrentDate)),
    _CurrentQuarterSerial = (4 * Date.Year(Date.From(_CurrentDate))) +  Date.QuarterOfYear(Date.From(_CurrentDate)),
    _CurrentMonthSerial = (12 * Date.Year(Date.From(_CurrentDate))) +  Date.Month(Date.From(_CurrentDate)),
    
    _DayCount = Duration.Days(Duration.From(_EndDate - _StartDate)) + 1,
    _Dates = List.Dates(_StartDate, _DayCount, #duration(1,0,0,0)),
    _DateTable = Table.FromList(_Dates, Splitter.SplitByNothing(), type table [Date = Date.Type] ),
    
    //Day
    _InsertDateSerial = Table.AddColumn(_DateTable, "Date Serial", each Int64.From([Date]), Int64.Type),
    _InsertRelativeDay = Table.AddColumn(_InsertDateSerial, "Relative Day", each Int64.From([Date] - _CurrentDate), Int64.Type),

    //Year
    _InsertYear = Table.AddColumn(_InsertRelativeDay, "Year", each Date.Year([Date]), Int64.Type),
    _InsertRelativeYear = Table.AddColumn(_InsertYear, "Relative Year", each [Year] - _CurrentYear, Int64.Type),
    
    //Quarter
    _InsertQuarterNumber = Table.AddColumn(_InsertRelativeYear, "Quarter Number", each Date.QuarterOfYear([Date]), Int64.Type),
    _InsertQuarterSerial = Table.AddColumn(_InsertQuarterNumber, "Quarter Serial", each (4 * Date.Year([Date])) +  Date.QuarterOfYear([Date]), Int64.Type),
    _InsertRelativeQuarter = Table.AddColumn(_InsertQuarterSerial, "Relative Quarter", each [Quarter Serial] - _CurrentQuarterSerial, Int64.Type),

    //Month
    _InsertMonthNumber = Table.AddColumn(_InsertRelativeQuarter, "Month Number", each Date.Month([Date]), Int64.Type),
    _InsertMonthSerial = Table.AddColumn(_InsertMonthNumber, "Month Serial", each (12 * Date.Year(Date.From([Date]))) +  Date.Month(Date.From([Date])), Int64.Type),
    _InsertRelativeMonth = Table.AddColumn(_InsertMonthSerial, "Relative Month", each [Month Serial] - _CurrentMonthSerial, Int64.Type),

    //Day of X
    _InsertDayOfYear = Table.AddColumn(_InsertRelativeMonth, "Day of Year", each Date.DayOfYear([Date]), Int64.Type),
    _InsertDayOfQuarter = Table.AddColumn(_InsertDayOfYear, "Day of Quarter", each Int64.From([Date] - Date.StartOfQuarter([Date])) + 1, Int64.Type),
    _InsertDayOfMonth = Table.AddColumn(_InsertDayOfQuarter, "Day of Month", each Date.Day([Date]), Int64.Type),
    _InsertDayOfWeek = Table.AddColumn(_InsertDayOfMonth, "Day of Week", each Date.DayOfWeek([Date], Day.Monday) + 1, Int64.Type),

    //ISO Years and Weeks
    _fxISO = (Record as record) =>
        let
            Date = Date.From(Record[Date]),
            
            CurrentThursday =  Date.AddDays( Date, 3 - Date.DayOfWeek( Date, Day.Monday ) ), 
            YearCurrThursday = Date.Year( CurrentThursday ), 
            
            FirstThursdayOfYear = 
                    Date.AddDays( #date(YearCurrThursday, 1, 7) , 
                                - Date.DayOfWeek( #date( YearCurrThursday, 1, 1 ), Day.Friday ) ), 
            
            ISO_Week = Duration.Days( CurrentThursday - FirstThursdayOfYear ) / 7 + 1,

            AddWeek = Record.AddField(Record, "Week (ISO)", ISO_Week),
            AddYear = Record.AddField(AddWeek,"Year (ISO)", YearCurrThursday),
            SelectFields = Record.SelectFields(AddYear, {"Week (ISO)", "Year (ISO)"})
        in
            SelectFields,

    _GetISOValues = Table.AddColumn(_InsertDayOfWeek, "ISO", each _fxISO(_)),
    _ExpandISOValues = Table.ExpandRecordColumn(_GetISOValues, "ISO", {"Week (ISO)", "Year (ISO)"}, {"Week (ISO)", "Year (ISO)"}),
    _ChangedTypeISOValues = Table.TransformColumnTypes(_ExpandISOValues,{{"Week (ISO)", Int64.Type}, {"Year (ISO)", Int64.Type}}),
    _InsertISOWeekSerial = Table.AddColumn(_ChangedTypeISOValues, "Week (ISO) Serial", each Number.Round((Int64.From([Date])+2)/7), Int64.Type),

    //Current Date ISO Values
    _CurrentISOYear =  _InsertISOWeekSerial{[Date = _CurrentDate]}[#"Year (ISO)"],
    _CurrentISOWeek = _InsertISOWeekSerial{[Date = _CurrentDate]}[#"Week (ISO)"],
    _CurrentISOWeekSerial = _InsertISOWeekSerial{[Date = _CurrentDate]}[#"Week (ISO) Serial"],

    //Relative ISO Week
    _InsertRelativeISOWeek = Table.AddColumn(_InsertISOWeekSerial, "Relative Week (ISO)", each [#"Week (ISO) Serial"] - _CurrentISOWeekSerial, Int64.Type),

    //Holidays
    _MergeHolidayTable = Table.NestedJoin(_InsertRelativeISOWeek, {"Date"}, _Holidays, {"Date"}, "Holidays", JoinKind.LeftOuter),

//Function 2 - Generate a Holiday Table --------------------------------------------------

_fxHolidays = (_ISOCountry as text, StartYear as number, EndYear as number) =>

let

    _fxEasterSunday = (_Year as number) =>
        let
            //INFORMATION
            //Source: https://no.wikipedia.org/wiki/P%C3%A5skeformelen#P%C3%A5skeformler_i_%C3%A9n_enkelt_celle_i_regneark_(bare_for_gregoriansk_kalender)
            //Function adapted from Excel: FLOOR(DATE(A2,3,27-DAY(0))+0.97*MOD(18.998*MOD(A2+8/9,19)+INT(0.68*INT(A2/100)-INT(A2/400)-5/9),30),7)+DAY(1)
            //Excel INT function: Rounds a number down to the nearest integer = Number.RoundDown
            //Excel FLOOR function = Number.RoundDown(Number/Significance,0) * Significance

            Step1 = Int64.From(#date(_Year, 3, 27)),
            Step2 = 18.998 * Number.Mod(_Year + (8/9), 19) + Number.RoundDown(0.68 * Number.RoundDown(_Year/100) - Number.RoundDown(_Year/400) - (5/9)),
            Step3 = 0.97 * Number.Mod(Step2, 30),
            Step4 = Number.RoundDown((Step1 + Step3) / 7, 0) * 7, 
            Step5 = Step4 + 1
        in
            Step5,

    //------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    _fxWeekday = (_Year as number, _WeekDayNumber as number, _MonthNumber as number, _OffsetWeek as number, _OffsetDays as number) =>
        let
            //INFORMATION
            //This function calculates the date for a specific weekday in a specific week of a month.
            //For instance, calculate the first Wednesday in March 2023.

            //_OffsetWeek-- 1 = first, 2 = second, ... -1 = last, -2 = second - last, ...
            //_OffsetWeek cannot be 0

            _ReferenceDate1 = if _OffsetWeek < 0 then 1 else 0, 
            _ReferenceDate2 = 1 + Number.Mod (_MonthNumber - 1 + _ReferenceDate1, 12),
            _ReferenceDate3 = Int64.From( #date(_Year, _ReferenceDate2, 1) ),
            _ReferenceDate4 = _ReferenceDate3 - _ReferenceDate1,

            _ReferenceWeekDayNumber = Date.DayOfWeek(Date.From(_ReferenceDate4), Day.Sunday),

            _Offset1 = _WeekDayNumber - _ReferenceWeekDayNumber + 7 * _OffsetWeek,
            _Offset2 = if _WeekDayNumber >= _ReferenceWeekDayNumber then -7 else 0,
            _Offset3 = if _ReferenceWeekDayNumber >= _WeekDayNumber then 7 else 0,
            _Offset4 = if _OffsetWeek > 0 then _Offset2 else _Offset3,
            _Offset5 = _Offset1 + _Offset4,

            _Result = Date.From(_ReferenceDate4 + _Offset5 + _OffsetDays)

        in
            _Result,

    //------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    _fxSwedishMidsummer = (_Year as number) =>
        let
            //INFORMATION
            //Compute the Midsummer day in Swedish - it is the Saturday between 20 and 26 June
            //This calculation is valid only for years after 1953 
            //https://sv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Midsommar_i_Sverige
            
            Step1 = #date(_Year, 6, 20),
            Step2 = Int64.From(Step1) + (7 - (Date.DayOfWeek(Step1) + 1))
        in
            Step2,

              ColumnType = Value.Type(FirstRowValue)

      // Converting the list to a record

shared #"CustomerInvoice-test" = let

  //Function ----------

  _fxInsertBlankRow = (_Table as table) =>

    let
      ColumnNames = Table.ColumnNames(_Table),
      
      // Creating a new row with -1 for numeric columns and "N/A" for text columns
      NewRow = List.Transform(ColumnNames, (cn) => 
          let 
              FirstRowRecord = Table.FirstN(_Table, 1){0},
              FirstRowValue = Record.FieldOrDefault(FirstRowRecord, cn),
              ColumnType = Value.Type(FirstRowValue)
          in
              if Type.Is(ColumnType, type number) then -1 
              else if Type.Is(ColumnType, type text) then "N/A" 
              else null),

      // Converting the list to a record
      NewRowRecord = Record.FromList(NewRow, ColumnNames),
      AddedRow = Table.InsertRows(_Table, Table.RowCount(_Table), {NewRowRecord})

    in
      AddedRow,
  
  //-----------------------

  Source = Sql.Database(Server, Database),
  Navigation = Source{[Schema = "dbo", Item = "CustomerInvoice"]}[Data]
in
  Navigation;
